---
title: '<i>Beescape</i> and <i>BeeSpatial</i>: Making multi-scale environmental indicators
  of bee habitat accessible across audiences'
author:
- Li, K.
- Grab, H.
- Buckner, M. A.
- Houtman, L.
- Kammerer, M.
- McLaughlin, D.
- Ostroski, A.
- Douglas, M. R.
- Goslee, S. C.
- Khanna, V.
- Lonsdorf, E. V.
- Robinson, A. C.
- Grozinger, C. M.
categories: []
url_source: https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2665972726002709
url_preprint: ''
journ: Environmental and Sustainability Indicators
volume: 31
page: '101381'
year: 2026
date: '2026-09-01'
doi: 10.1016/j.indic.2026.101381
---
